---
title: "Chapter7"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-19"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
source('Brownian_motion.R',keep.source = TRUE)
source('EM.R',keep.source = TRUE)
source('plots.R',keep.source = TRUE)
library(Rcpp)
sourceCpp("DoubleWell.cpp") # functions for Strang splitting and likelihood 

########################################################
# Step 1: Definer 0=t_0<t_1<...<t_N=T og drift- og noise-funktioner
########################################################
t_0 <- 0
N <- 600000
h <- 0.0001
T <- N*h
times <- seq(t_0,N*h,length.out=N+1)
# noisy_times <- sort(times + rnorm(length(times), mean = 0, sd = 0.1))

# drift term
F <- function(x,theta = c(0.2, -0.05)){
  eps<-theta[1]; y<-theta[2]
  (x[1]-x[1]^3-y)/eps
}


# additive noise term
G <- function(x, Sigma = c(1.4)) Sigma

########################################################
# Step 3: Euler-Maruyama simulation af SDE løsningen med plots. M_reps repetitions.
########################################################

x0 <- c(0)
n_paths <- 20
paths <- EM_sim_fast(F,G,x0,times,n_paths,progress = TRUE)

# Plot første repetition
#plot_variable_vs_time(paths[[1]],times,to_time = T)

# Definer eventuelt sub paths
ratio <- 600
sub_h <- h*ratio
sub_times <- seq(t_0,N*h,length.out=N/ratio+1)
idx <- seq(1,N+1,by=ratio)
sub_paths <- lapply(paths, function(path) {
  df <- as.data.frame(path)
  # ensure idx are in bounds
  valid_idx <- idx[idx <= nrow(df)]
  df_sub <- df[valid_idx, , drop = FALSE]
  if (ncol(df_sub) == 1) {
    names(df_sub) <- "X"
  }
  df_sub
})
plot_variable_vs_time(sub_paths[[1]],sub_times,T)
#write.csv(bind_rows(sub_paths, .id = "path_id"), "doublewell_paths.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```


```{r}


BiasR <- function(b,x,y,epsilon,sigma,well,const_term_in_N=FALSE){
  uns_root <- median(Re(polyroot(c(-y,1,0,-1))))
  if (well == 'left'){
    x <- x[x<uns_root]
  }else if (well == 'right'){
    x <- x[x>=uns_root]
  }
  if (const_term_in_N == FALSE){
    denom <- 1/(24*epsilon^3)
    top <- (-6*b^3+3*y)*x^4 +
      x^3*(-36*b^4-24*sigma^2*epsilon+36*b^2-8) +
      x^2*(54*(b^3-y)*(b^2-1/3)) +
      x*(-24*b^6+54*b^2*epsilon*sigma^2+36*b^3*y-12*sigma^2*epsilon-12*y^2) +
      6*b^5-9*b^4*y+b^3*(-18*sigma^2*epsilon-4) +
      6*b^2*y+12*epsilon*sigma^2*y
    B <- mean((top*denom)^2)
  }else if (const_term_in_N ==TRUE){
    c0 <- (3*x^2*y)/(8*epsilon^3) - x^3/(3*epsilon^3) - y/(12*epsilon^3) - sigma^2*x^3/epsilon^2 - sigma^2*x/(2*epsilon^2) + sigma^2*y/(8*epsilon^2)
    c1 <- -x*y/(4*epsilon^3) + (3*x^2)/(8*epsilon^3) + 1/(12*epsilon^3) + x^4/(8*epsilon^3) + (3*sigma^2)/(8*epsilon^2)
    c2 <- (9*sigma^2*x)/(4*epsilon^2) + (3*x^3)/(2*epsilon^3) + (3*y)/(8*epsilon^3) - x/(4*epsilon^3) - (9*x^2*y)/(8*epsilon^3)
    c3 <- (3*x*y)/(4*epsilon^3) - (9*x^2)/(4*epsilon^3) - 3/(8*epsilon^3) - (9*sigma^2)/(8*epsilon^2) - (3*x^4)/(8*epsilon^3)
    c4 <- -(3*x^3)/(2*epsilon^3) + (3*x)/(2*epsilon^3) - (3*y)/(8*epsilon^3)
    c5 <- (27*x^2)/(8*epsilon^3) + 3/(8*epsilon^3)
    c6 <- -(9*x)/(4*epsilon^3)
    B <- mean((c0+c1*b+c2*b^2+c3*b^3+c4*b^4+c5*b^5+c6*b^6)^2)
  }
  return(B)
}

```

```{r}

methods <- c("fix","fix penalized")
method_names <- c('Standard fixed point linearization',"fix penalized")

# True parameter vector (for overlay)
true_params <- c(0.2, -0.05, 1.4)

# Labels for parameters
param_labels <- c("epsilon", "y", "sigma")
n_paths <- length(paths)
par0_list <- lapply(1:n_paths, function(x) c(0.2 + runif(1,-0.15,0.15) ,runif(1,-0.2,0.2),1.4+runif(1,-1,1)) )
fit_for_center <- function(method, show_progress = FALSE) {
  
  preds <- vector("list", n_paths)
  for (i in seq_along(sub_paths)) {
    if (show_progress) message("  fitting path ", i, " / ", n_paths)
    this_path <- sub_paths[[i]]
    #par0 <- par0_list[[i]]
    par0 <- c(0.25,0,1)
  
    obj <- function(par, path, times) {
      
      if (par[1] < 0.001 || par[1] > 1) return(1e20)
      if (par[2] < -0.37 || par[2] > 0.37) return(1e20)
      if (par[3] < 0.001) return(1e20)


      fixed_points <- Re(polyroot(c(-par[2],1,0,-1)))
      uns_fix <- median(fixed_points)
      left_fix <- min(fixed_points)
      right_fix <- max(fixed_points)
      if (method == "fix") {
        b_vec <- c(left_fix, right_fix)
        penalty <- 0
      }
      if (method == "fix penalized") {
        b_vec <- c(left_fix, right_fix)
        left_bias <- BiasR(left_fix,path$X,par[2],par[1],par[3],'left',TRUE)
        right_bias <- BiasR(right_fix,path$X,par[2],par[1],par[3],'right',TRUE)

        penalty <- mean((left_bias+right_bias)^2)
        print(penalty)
        
      }else if (method == "negative fix") {
        b_vec <- -c(left_fix, right_fix)/2
      }
      
      else if (method == "zero") {
        b_vec <- c(left_fix,0, right_fix)
      }
      else if (method == "uns") {
        b_vec <- c(left_fix,uns_fix, right_fix)
      }
      else if (method == "theoretical bias (taylor)") {
        left_b <- optimize(avg_absbias,c(-1.4,0),par[2],par[1],par[3],'left',FALSE)$minimum
        right_b <- optimize(avg_absbias,c(0,1.4),par[2],par[1],par[3],'right',FALSE)$minimum

        b_vec <- c(left_b,right_b)
      }
      else if (method == "average N") {
        b_vec <- c(optimize(avg_absN,c(-1.5,1.5),par[2],par[1],par[3],'both',FALSE)$minimum)
      }
      else if (method == "OU expectation b test") {
        A <- (1-3*path$X^2)/par[1]
        cond1 <- path$X < -1/sqrt(3)
        cond2 <- path$X >1/sqrt(3)
        b_vec <- ifelse(cond1,
                        left_fix + (path$X-left_fix)*exp(A*sub_h),
                        ifelse(cond2,
                               right_fix + (path$X-right_fix)*exp(A*sub_h),
                               oldX*exp(A*sub_h)))
      }else if (method == "One-step expectation") {
        
        f_root <- function(b, x, x0) {
          Fb <- (-b^3+b-par[2])/par[1]
          DFb <- (1-3*b^2)/par[1]
          b_tilde <- b - Fb/DFb
          (x0 - b_tilde) * exp((1 - 3 * b_tilde^2) / par[1] * sub_h) + (b_tilde - x)
        }
        
        b_vec <- mapply(
          function(xi, x0i) {
            f <- function(b) f_root(b, xi, x0i)
            
            fa <- f(-1.5)
            fb <- f(1.5)
            
            if (fa * fb < 0) {
              uniroot(f, c(-1.5, 1.5))$root
            } else {
              optimize(function(b) abs(f(b)), c(-1.5, 1.5))$minimum
            }
          },
          path$X,
          c(path$X[1], head(path$X, -1))
        )
      }
      else if (method == "One-step expectation test") {
        Fx <- (-path$X^3+path$X-par[2])/par[1]
        DFx <- (1-3*path$X^2)/par[1]
        D2Fx <- -6*path$X/par[1]
        D3Fx <- -6/par[1]
        b_vec <- path$X + sub_h*Fx + sub_h^2/2 * (DFx*Fx + 0.5*par[3]^2*D2Fx) + sub_h^3*(1/6*(D2Fx*Fx^2+DFx*Fx^2+par[3]^2*D3Fx*Fx) + 1/4*(par[3]^2*D2Fx*DFx))
      }
      
      
      

      res <- tryCatch(
          log_lik_path_rcpp(as.matrix(path), times, par[1:2],par[3],
                            method = method,b_vec,uns_fix),
          error = function(e) NULL
        )

      if (is.null(res) || !is.finite(res$ll)) {
        return(1e20)
      }
      lambda <- 1
      return(res$ll + lambda*penalty)  
    }
    
    fit <- optim(par    = par0,
                 fn     = obj,
                 path   = this_path,
                 times  = sub_times,
                 method = "Nelder-Mead",
                 control = list(maxit = 5000, trace = 0)
    )

    preds[[i]] <- fit$par
    
  }
  
  # Convert results to data.frame
  preds_mat <- do.call(rbind, preds)
  colnames(preds_mat) <- param_labels
  out_df <- as.data.frame(preds_mat)
  return(out_df)
}

# ---------------------- run fits for all centers -----------------------
all_results_list <- vector("list", length(methods))

for (i in seq_along(methods)) {
  mname <- method_names[i]
  meth  <- methods[[i]]
  message("Running fits for center: ", mname)
  
  res_df <- fit_for_center(meth, show_progress = TRUE)
  
  # add run index and center label
  res_df <- res_df %>% 
    mutate(run = seq_len(nrow(res_df)), 
           method = mname)
  
  all_results_list[[i]] <- res_df
}

# Combine results and remove rows where all parameters are NA
all_results <- bind_rows(all_results_list)
all_results <- all_results %>% 
  filter(!apply(select(., all_of(param_labels)), 1, function(r) all(is.na(r))))

est_df <- all_results %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(param_labels),
               names_to = "param",
               values_to = "estimate") %>%
  mutate(param = factor(param, levels = param_labels),
         method = factor(method, levels = method_names))

# ---------------------- use your new plotting function -----------------------
p <- plot_estimates(
  est_df       = est_df,
  true_params  = true_params,
  param_labels = param_labels,
  method_names = method_names,
  title_text   = "Parameter Estimates Across Methods",
  subtitle     = "SDE estimation comparison"
)

print(p)
```
